name: Prediction Market Signal Aggregator
description: Cross-platform prediction market intelligence: real-time odds from Polymarket + Kalshi + Metaculus, combined with mobile-proxy-scraped social sentiment from Twitter/X and Reddit. Detects arbitrage opportunities and sentiment divergence.

endpoints.description: Full signal with odds + sentiment + arbitrage detection
Social sentiment analysis via mobile proxy

pricing.comparison: Polymarket Pro costs $50/month for advanced analytics. Kalshi data feeds start at $100/month. No existing service combines cross-platform odds with real-time social sentiment. Our mobile proxy IPs enable Twitter/Reddit scraping that datacenter IPs cannot achieve.

whyMobileProxy: Market data APIs (Polymarket, Kalshi) are public — no proxy needed. The unique value requiring mobile proxies is the SENTIMENT layer: Twitter/X aggressively blocks datacenter IPs for search scraping. Reddit's new anti-bot measures target datacenter traffic. Mobile carrier IPs from Proxies.sx bypass these blocks, enabling real-time sentiment signals that predict where prediction market odds will move before they move.
uptime: 99%+ (market data from public APIs, sentiment via mobile proxy with retry logic)
limitations: Twitter sentiment depends on mobile proxy availability
Kalshi requires auth for some endpoints — using public market data only
Metaculus API may require authentication for some queries
Sentiment analysis is keyword-based (not ML) — adequate for directional signals
Cross-platform event matching uses keyword similarity — may miss some matches
